nemys
Sign.
54-59. The Sun in Ascendant gives kingdom during his Dasa; while posited in other Kendras
ruled by inimical planets there will be disorders of hip, throat and eyes. Debilitated Sun in his
Dasa causes destruction of eyes, fever and head disorders, confinement, leprosy and other
disorders. If the Sun is exalted, there will be gain of kingdom with royal insignia in such Dasa.
Apart, there will be acquisition of elephants, steeds etc. The Dasa of the Sun placed in his
Moolatrikona will indicate destruction of all kinds of miseries and leadership of large
provinces. In the Dasa of the Sun placed in inimical Sign, one will incur affliction of eyes,
hump-back, disorders caused by fire, facial diseases and humiliation due to misconduct. The
159

8th House placement of the Sun will cause in his Dasa affliction to the entire body and
wanderings in various countries.
60-65. MOONS DASA. The Moons Dasa is generally differentiated in six categories, viz. exalted,
